feature: Verify make check passes and document install-hooks Linux completion
workflow_rationale: This is a verification and documentation task. Previous agents have already implemented the install-hooks feature with full Linux systemd support. No code changes are needed - only verification that everything works and documentation of the implementation status.

phases.name: Verification
phases.description: Verify that make check passes and install-hooks Linux implementation is complete

subtasks.description: Run make check to verify tests, clippy, and format all pass

verification.expected: All tests pass, clippy has zero warnings, format check passes

subtasks.notes: Successfully ran make check: all 446 tests passed, clippy completed with zero warnings (-D warnings), and format check passed. Verification complete.

verification.instructions: Review factory.rs lines 359-415 to confirm: (1) .service and .path files are written to ~/.config/systemd/user/, (2) daemon-reload is called, (3) enable is called for both units, (4) start is called for both units. Review lines 639-674 to confirm --uninstall: (1) stops both units, (2) disables both units, (3) removes both files, (4) runs daemon-reload.

subtasks.notes: Verified install_hooks_linux implementation in factory.rs. INSTALL (lines 359-415): ✓ writes .service/.path files to ~/.config/systemd/user/, ✓ runs daemon-reload, ✓ enables both units with error handling, ✓ starts both units with error handling. UNINSTALL (lines 639-674): ✓ stops both units, ✓ disables both units, ✓ removes both files, ✓ runs daemon-reload. All 8 requirements verified and complete.

phases.name: Documentation
phases.description: Create output/result.md documenting the verification results

verification.expected: File exists and contains verification summary

subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive verification summary in output/result.md. Documented: (1) make check passing status (446 tests, zero clippy warnings, format check passed), (2) install_hooks_linux implementation completeness (8/8 requirements verified), (3) all acceptance criteria satisfied. Verification command passed successfully.

parallelism.speedup_estimate: No parallelism - sequential verification then documentation

acceptance_criteria: install_hooks_linux has all required systemd operations
verification_strategy.reasoning: This is a verification task with no code changes. Risk is trivial since we're only documenting existing functionality.

steps: Verify make check passes with zero warnings
Verify output/result.md contains accurate verification summary
